sizing_rule.note: Optimal f calculation to maximize gain/loss ratio. Specific f value not provided in excerpt. Author (Ralph Vince) acknowledges this approach produces severe drawdowns at the optimal level. Implementation requires historical trade data to calculate optimal f.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be optimized to a level where the ratio of potential gains to potential losses in equity are maximized, though this optimal level will result in severe drawdowns.
